text: A photo of an office filled with sticky notes.
A group of giraffes huddle under a tiki hut.
A hotel room with two beds and two suitcases.
Graffiti on an open door to a restroom stall.
A picture of the sun setting in the trees.

A small dog eating a treat next to a couple of knitted hats.

A park bench up against a brick wall.
A person is walking in the snow near a tree.
